meta.title: Siba Osman — Nutrition Specialist
meta.description: Personalized nutrition plans to help you achieve your health goals with dietitian Siba Osman.

hero.title: Your Journey to Better Health Starts Here
hero.subtitle: As a dedicated nutrition specialist, I create personalized plans that fit your lifestyle, helping you reach your health goals with confidence and support every step of the way.

services.title: Nutrition Strategies
services.description: Tailored eating plans based on your body composition, lifestyle, and personal health goals.

services.title: Meal Planning
services.description: Weekly meal plans with recipes you'll actually enjoy — no cookie-cutter diets.

services.title: Vitamins & Supplements
services.description: Evidence-based guidance on what your body actually needs — no guesswork.

services.title: Fitness & Wellness
services.description: Holistic guidance that pairs nutrition with movement for complete wellbeing.

services.title: Body Composition
services.description: Track real progress with body measurements, not just the scale.

services.title: Ongoing Support
services.description: Regular check-ins to adjust your plan as your body and goals evolve.

plans.title: Choose Your Plan
plans.subtitle: Find the perfect plan for your health journey.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Transform Your Health?
ctaSection.subtitle: Get in touch today and let's start your personalized nutrition journey.

services.title: Subscription Plans
services.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. Every plan includes personalized nutrition guidance from Siba Osman.

footer.tagline: Personalized nutrition for a healthier you.
